'''鈭歳-s-sh-f''' ('''karashefoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:vaut|vaut]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-s-sh-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:vaut|vaut]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歳-s-sh-f
|-
! Lemma
| karashefoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thirashefoko|thirashefoko]] || [[word:jirashefoko|jirashefoko]] || [[word:shirashefoko|shirashefoko]] || [[word:kirashefoko|kirashefoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthurashefoko|thuthurashefoko]] || [[word:jujurashefoko|jujurashefoko]] || [[word:shushurashefoko|shushurashefoko]] || [[word:kukurashefoko|kukurashefoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thurashefoko|thurashefoko]] || [[word:jurashefoko|jurashefoko]] || [[word:shurashefoko|shurashefoko]] || [[word:kurashefoko|kurashefoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thurashefoko|thurashefoko]] || [[word:jurashefoko|jurashefoko]] || [[word:shurashefoko|shurashefoko]] || [[word:kurashefoko|kurashefoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:therashefoko|therashefoko]] || [[word:jerashefoko|jerashefoko]] || [[word:sherashefoko|sherashefoko]] || [[word:kerashefoko|kerashefoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothorashefoko|thothorashefoko]] || [[word:jojorashefoko|jojorashefoko]] || [[word:shoshorashefoko|shoshorashefoko]] || [[word:kokorashefoko|kokorashefoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thorashefoko|thorashefoko]] || [[word:jorashefoko|jorashefoko]] || [[word:shorashefoko|shorashefoko]] || [[word:korashefoko|korashefoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thorashefoko|thorashefoko]] || [[word:jorashefoko|jorashefoko]] || [[word:shorashefoko|shorashefoko]] || [[word:korashefoko|korashefoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙rashefoko|th忙rashefoko]] || [[word:j忙rashefoko|j忙rashefoko]] || [[word:sh忙rashefoko|sh忙rashefoko]] || [[word:k忙rashefoko|k忙rashefoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thatharashefoko|thatharashefoko]] || [[word:jajarashefoko|jajarashefoko]] || [[word:shasharashefoko|shasharashefoko]] || [[word:kakarashefoko|kakarashefoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:tharashefoko|tharashefoko]] || [[word:jarashefoko|jarashefoko]] || [[word:sharashefoko|sharashefoko]] || [[word:karashefoko|karashefoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:tharashefoko|tharashefoko]] || [[word:jarashefoko|jarashefoko]] || [[word:sharashefoko|sharashefoko]] || [[word:karashefoko|karashefoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
